items.subject: Am Timan cholera - roster needed within 72h
items.snippet: Health cluster is asking for an epidemiologist and WASH capacity on the ground by Friday. Please confirm a deployable roster tonight. French required; YF + cholera vaccination mandatory for the zone.

items.subject: Do not route via Sudan
items.snippet: Reminder to all coordinators: West Darfur is Level 4 and the Adre crossing is closed. Do NOT plan any transit into Chad via Sudan. Route incoming staff through N'Djamena.

items.subject: Mobilization call - today 16:00 UTC
items.snippet: Lock the Am Timan deployment roster and logistics. Ahmed is already in N'Djamena and can receive the team; need epi + WASH confirmed before the call.
